Scoring System

How points work

Universal — all positions

📋 Appearance

+1
Every player earns 1 point just for showing up and playing the match.

⚽ Goal scored

+2
2 points per goal scored. Stack them up — a hat-trick alone is worth 6 points.

⭐ Man of the Match

+3
Voted by the team. The biggest single-match bonus available to any position.

🏆 Team win

+2
Every player in a winning squad earns +2 pts — the same regardless of position. Losses = 0 bonus. Win together, earn together.

Positional bonus — per match

Defenders and the GK earn bonus points based on goals conceded that match — a golf-style sliding scale. The fewer goals let in, the more points earned. Midfielders and forwards don't receive this bonus.

🛡️ Defenders — per match

0 goals conceded+4 pts
1 goal conceded+3 pts
2 goals conceded+2 pts
3 goals conceded+1 pt
4+ goals conceded+0 pts

🧤 Goalkeeper — per match

0 goals conceded+5 pts
1 goal conceded+4 pts
2 goals conceded+3 pts
3 goals conceded+2 pts
4+ goals conceded+0 pts

Win / Loss factor

WIN
+2 pts
Every player who played earns the bonus — forward, midfielder, defender, goalkeeper. You win as a team.
LOSS
+0 pts
No win bonus. Individual scoring (goals, MOTM, appearance) still counts — a loss doesn't erase your personal contribution.
Why +2 for a win? It keeps all positions on equal footing. A goalkeeper who concedes 0 in a win earns up to 7 pts from positional bonus alone (5 + 2 win). A striker who scores and wins earns 1 + 2 + 2 = 5 pts minimum. The win bonus is the common thread that rewards collective effort — showing up to a winning team matters.

Impact factor

Formula
Goals + (MOTMs × 2)
A quick measure of attacking and standout contribution. Doesn't include appearances or win bonuses — purely reflects individual brilliance.
